ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Recent Activity on Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We detected a recent transaction on your account ending in 1234.

- Amount: $1,200.00
- Date: 2026-04-07
- Location: New York, NY

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately.
For more details, click <URL>.

Thank you for choosing our bank.

Sincerely,
Your Bank Support Team

spam.subject: IT Support Ticket #98765 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello Team,

Your IT ticket #98765 has been flagged for a critical security update. To ensure your system remains secure, please review the attached audit report and confirm the remediation steps by clicking <URL> within the next 2 hours.

Failure to comply may result in account suspension.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
IT Support Team
